name: Rice Porridge
recipeInstructions: Combine the water, rice flakes, and wheat bran in a pot on low heat. Do not allow it to boil; let it simmer gently. Add the cloves, raisins or sultanas, washed and sliced apple (thinly), cinnamon bark (grate with a suribachi or mortar and pestle), freshly grated ginger, and vanilla essence. Stir occasionally. When the apple slices are tender, turn off the heat. Sprinkle over freshly grated ginger and stir in. Serve mixed with milk of choice and topped with oatbran.
